ItacPersonItem.Notes: According to Appendini, Bona was given the task of writing a Dizionario Illirico by the Accademia degli Oziosi in Ragusa, in collaboration with Giovanni Alethy and Giorgio Mattei. Aged 18, Vincenzo Petrovich delivered a poem to the Oziosi Academy, on the occasion of Ladislao Buchia`s legation to Ragusa.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
